title: T-096 — releaseNpdProjectToFactory canonical NPD Builder release orchestrator

pipeline_inputs.description: Canonical releaseNpdProjectToFactory action covering WIP/FG/shared BOM/factory_spec/status transaction and blockers.
pipeline_inputs.details:
NPD Builder release transaction invokes G3 FG mapping, shared BOM SSOT writer, Technical factory_spec API, RM usability validation and release status model. D365 optional only.
Preserved acceptance requirements: Given D365 integration is disabled, when release runs, then Monopilot release still succeeds and no D365 export is attempted.; Given Technical approval is missing, when release completes, then status is pending_technical_approval and factory/Planning consumers cannot use the FG.
scope_files: Existing NPD Builder/release action paths discovered before editing
out_of_scope: Technical approval UI (cross-module, may be 03-TECH task)
acceptance_criteria: Release transaction creates WIP/intermediates, FG mapping, initial shared BOM, factory_spec in_review and release audit/events idempotently after G4/evidence closure.
RM usability, packaging, BOM/spec or policy blockers abort with typed blockers and no factory-usable partial state.
D365 disabled or optional export does not block or mutate release state.
Missing Technical approval leaves status pending_technical_approval and not factory-usable.
test_strategy: RED unit tests for preflight blockers and idempotency.
RED integration test for transaction rollback on RM usability failure.
RED event-ordering test for release_requested → released_records_created → pending_technical_approval.
risk_red_lines: Do not perform D365 export inside release transaction.
Do not mark FG/BOM/spec factory-usable before Technical approval.
Do not bypass shared BOM SSOT or create NPD-only BOM tables.
Do not ignore RM usability blockers.
